examples: Somehow he always manages to outwit his opponents.
To win the presidency he first had to outwit his rivals within the Socialist Party.
One is that people's capacity to outwit other species, not their aggressiveness, appears to be the dominant factor in human survival.
Jason Babinsky holds his own as a lawyer who gamely tries to outwit the unpredictable judge.
These talented young professionals were utilizing their educations and considerable skills to outwit each other.
